title: Rivals Experience
description: A modpack made for Rivals Members !
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb3b1ec9c105541ea40f10a0ed6b1f218a436ff6.png)
### Introducing Wonders Experience :
This modpack was exclusively created for the Rivals Team content creators group. It features a curated selection of powerful and exciting mods designed to kickstart your content creation journey. Whether you're just starting or already creating, this pack will make you feel like a true member of the Rivals Team.
### What Does it Offer ?
**🎬 Content Creation** : Packed with mods that enhance camera control, replay features, and creative tools—perfect for making videos and thumbnails.

**⚡ Performance Boosting** : Optimized with performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Lithium, and others to ensure smooth gameplay while recording or streaming.

**🧱 Building**: Includes building-focused mods like WorldEdit, Litematica, Axiom and more to bring your creative ideas to life with ease.

**⚔️ SMP-Friendly Mods**: Features mods that enrich multiplayer experiences, such as client kits, Hurtcam, Armor HUD, and social tools—ideal for collaborative survival servers.
